prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低录取位次分别为约15186名、13596名、5049名、13182名、7293名，波动极为剧烈。2023年因专业组调整出现异常高位（5049名），2024年回落至13182名，2025年回升至7293名。近两年呈现"大小年"交替特征，2025年基准位次约7293名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年186人、2022年197人、2023年178人、2024年175人、2025年178人；2026年计划仅134人，较2025年大幅缩减约24.7%，为近六年最低。显著缩招将加剧竞争，推动录取位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第19名（2021年第13名→2022年第17名→2023年第19名→2024年第19名→2025年第19名→2026年第19名），稳居全国Top20，层次极高；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应类事件（如实习生吃剩饭谣言澄清），无重大负面冲击；抖音热度排名第37（较热），综合热度约127.7万，关注度中等偏上；2022年江西曾出现投档位次大幅下降记录，但山东未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估A+学科6个（教育学、心理学、中国语言文学、中国史、地理学、马克思主义理论），A级学科4个（数学、外国语言文学、生态学、统计学、环境科学与工程、体育学），A-学科6个（哲学、理论经济学、法学、物理学、化学、系统科学），A-及以上共18个学科，学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2024年评估为"分化观望"，整体平稳；计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业持续高热，对北师大相关交叉专业有带动作用；山东省2026年高考报名总数约72万人，较2025年68.1万人增加约5.7%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；北京师范大学位于北京市，非本省高校；该校在山东省招生占比约3.6%–6.3%（2025年约6.3%），山东为其重要生源省份之一，无显著地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7293名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减24.7%、山东省考生总数增加约5.7%加剧竞争、以及2024–2025年"大小年"交替规律可能带来的回调心理，预测2026年最低录取位次约7293名，区间5912–6912名。最关键影响因素为：①招生计划大幅缩减推动位次前移约1081名；②2025年位次已处于近年中高位，继续大幅前移空间有限；③考生总数增加进一步加剧竞争。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6412名（区间5912–6912名），建议位次在区间下限（约5900名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档的历史学类和数学类；位次在区间中段（约6400名）的考生以二档的人文科学试验班、社会科学试验班为主力选择，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（约6900名）附近的考生以三档的教育学类和理科试验班为保底，同时可尝试二档专业。北师大在山东招生计划大幅缩减，竞争加剧，建议考生合理评估位次，避免盲目冲高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province were approximately 15186, 13596, 5049, 13182, and 7293 respectively, showing extreme volatility. In 2023, due to adjustments in major groups, an abnormally high ranking (5049) occurred, which dropped back to 13182 in 2024 and rose to 7293 in 2025. The past two years have exhibited an alternating pattern of "big and small years," with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 7293. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shandong Province: 186 in 2021, 197 in 2022, 178 in 2023, 175 in 2024, and 178 in 2025. The 2026 plan is only 134, a significant reduction of about 24.7% compared to 2025, the lowest in the past six years. This substantial reduction in enrollment will intensify competition, pushing the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 19th (2021: 13th → 2022: 17th → 2023: 19th → 2024: 19th → 2025: 19th → 2026: 19th), firmly in the national Top 20, indicating a very high level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents (such as clarification of rumors about interns eating leftovers), with no major negative impact. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.277 million, indicating moderate to high attention. In 2022, Jiangxi experienced a significant drop in admission rankings, but no clear signal of a gap year has been observed in Shandong. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 6 A+ disciplines (Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, Marxist Theory), 4 A-level disciplines (Mathematics, Foreign Languages and Literature, Ecology, Statistics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Physical Education), and 6 A- disciplines (Philosophy, Theoretical Economics, Law, Physics, Chemistry, Systems Science), totaling 18 disciplines at A- or above. The university's academic strength is top-tier, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher training/education majors in 2024 is assessed as "differentiated and wait-and-see," generally stable. Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to be highly popular, driving interest in related interdisciplinary majors at Beijing Normal University. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 5.7% from 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Shandong. The university's enrollment proportion in Shandong is about 3.6%–6.3% (approximately 6.3% in 2025), making Shandong one of its important source provinces, with no significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7293, the significant reduction of 24.7% in the 2026 enrollment plan, the increase of about 5.7% in the total number of candidates in Shandong Province intensifying competition, and the potential psychological adjustment due to the alternating pattern of "big and small years" in 2024–2025, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 7293, with a range of 5912–6912. The most critical influencing factors are: ① The significant reduction in the enrollment plan pushes the ranking forward by about 1081 places; ② The 2025 ranking is already at a relatively high level in recent years, limiting the potential for further significant forward movement; ③ The increase in the total number of candidates further intensifies competition.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 6412 (range 5912–6912). Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (approximately 5900) are advised to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like History and Mathematics. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 6400) should prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Humanities Experimental Class and Social Sciences Experimental Class, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (approximately 6900) should use Tier 3 majors like Education and Science Experimental Class as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 majors. With the significant reduction in Beijing Normal University's enrollment plan in Shandong, competition will intensify. Candidates are advised to reasonably assess their rankings and avoid blindly aiming too high.
